reasoning: France is the solo betting favorite after a perfect group stage, cementing top spot with a 3-1 win over Senegal and a 3-0 win over Iraq despite losing Ekitiké, and they have elite depth around Mbappé with Saliba fit. Spain is the clear second choice; despite an opening draw with Cape Verde they bounced back with a 4-0 win over Saudi Arabia and carry Euro 2024-winning pedigree with Yamal fit, though midfield injuries (Fermín López, Xavi Simons-type losses elsewhere) trim their depth. Argentina (Messi scoring all five of their goals), England and Portugal (revived by a 5-0 thrashing of Uzbekistan) are the chief threats, while Brazil look vulnerable having lost Rodrygo, Estêvão and Militão to injury. Hosts Mexico (perfect, no goals conceded, altitude edge) and the USA are genuine live outsiders, but Morocco — 2022 semifinalists who again topped a group with seven points — are the dark horse with the squad and tournament savvy to reach the semis.
